summary: One integration test (dubbo-samples-test-11137) timed out during the integration test run, causing the job to fail.
root_cause: Integration test 'dubbo-samples-test-11137' reported a test run timeout and did not complete within the allotted time.

evidence.quote: [2/23] [dubbo-samples-test-11137:1/1] TEST FAILURE: Run tests timeout, version: -Ddubbo.version=3.3.7-SNAPSHOT -Dspring.version=5.3.24 -Djava.version=21, please check logs: /home/runner/work/dubbo/dubbo/99-integration/dubbo-samples-test-11137/target/logs
evidence.reason: Explicit failure message indicating this specific test timed out and points to its logs.
Confirms there was one failing test in the test run.
Summarizes that the job failed due to one test failure.
Shows where aggregated test results were recorded for further inspection.
Indicates the CI job failed (non-zero exit) as a result of the test failure/timeout.

evidence.quote: Error response from daemon: invalid filter 'reference'
evidence.reason: Docker reported an error during the run/cleanup; may be ancillary but the primary failure is the test timeout.

suggested_fix: Inspect the logs at /home/runner/work/dubbo/dubbo/99-integration/dubbo-samples-test-11137/target/logs to determine why the test hung; if the test is flaky or needs more time, increase the test timeout or fix the test to avoid blocking, then re-run the CI job.
